abort.already_configured: This Azure DevOps project is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Azure DevOps.
error.invalid_auth: The PAT or organization is invalid.
error.no_projects: No visible projects were returned for this organization.
error.project_not_found: The selected project is no longer available. Please choose it again.
error.required_field: Organization and personal access token are required.

user.title: Connect to Azure DevOps
user.description: Choose an existing organization or enter a new one. If another Azure DevOps Tracker entry already exists, credentials can be reused by selecting it and leaving the PAT field set to the placeholder value.

project.title: Choose project and features
project.description: Pick the Azure DevOps project to monitor and enable the data domains you want Home Assistant to load.
